chunks.text: Company Profile Your Operational Technology Partner Automation - Electrical - Skids - Digital - Cybersecurity Projects Around The WorldCompany Growth & Expansion INTECH started as an entrepreneurial venture with three engineers and a single room oice. Over the course of more than thirty years INTECH has transformed into a global organization with 550 employees, 13 regional oices across five continents, 20+ nationalities, and a diverse product portfolio 1992 1998 - 2000 2003 2004 2005 2008 2010 2011 2013 2014 2019 2020 2023 INTECH starts o with 03 engineers INTECH incorporates in USA and extends its presence with oices in Nigeria and Singapore INTECH opens oice in Angola INTECH extends its regional presence in CIS region; opens office Kazakhstan and delivers its first project in Equatorial Guinea INTECH extends its regional presence to KSA INTECH opens its China Oice to strengthen its presence in Asia Pacific and reach out to Greater China INTECH sets up its Iraq Office INTECH Indonesia oice opens with the strategic objective of serving the Asia Pacific market INTECH sets up its world headquarters operations in UAE. A second manufacturing facility is set up to cater the needs of the Eastern Hemisphere eiciently INTECH extends collaboration with Rockwell Automation. Becomes a Platinum Solution Partner for control and safety systems in the Middle East and West Africa, Gold Partner in North America INTECH sets up software development oices in Singapore and UK Established manufacturing Factory in KSA 300+ Surface hydraulic control systems for controlling ~1000 wells at various sites. Compressor control systems for gathering unconventional gas from Jalamid field. Cybersecurity and DMZ upgrades at major substations and sites. ICSS upgrade and SCADA for gas leak detection system. Long-term digital transformation support contract. Cybersecurity infrastructure enhancement project for multiple sites. ICSS projects for reliability improvement, PLC obsolescence, and VMS

various sites. Compressor control systems for gathering unconventional gas from Jalamid field. Cybersecurity and DMZ upgrades at major substations and sites. ICSS upgrade and SCADA for gas leak detection system. Long-term digital transformation support contract. Cybersecurity infrastructure enhancement project for multiple sites. ICSS projects for reliability improvement, PLC obsolescence, and VMS upgrade. ICSS and Pi systems maintenance contracts Multi-well RTU-enabled intelligent completion hydraulic control systems for ADNOC oshore. ICSS cybersecurity services, implementation of data diodes at multiple facilities. O&M contract for wellpad and wellsite maintenance services. FDIS configuration with ICSS and SCADA updates. Digitalization and development of enterprise-level OT monitoring & analytics system. ICSS OT cybersecurity posture enhancement project. ICSS O&M contracts for multiple facilities and systems. Supply and design of Integrity Management Dashboards of critical systems . SCADA & digital oilfield implementation of 200+ wells for KOC’s digitalization at Jurassic field. Wellhead control systems for 70+ wells at Jurassic field. Advanced fire protection system design and upgrade at a refinery. Greenfield ICSS for carbon capture plant. Wellhead RTUs and control panels for onshore facilities. Compressor ESD upgrades. Containerized MCC buildings with integrated control systems. 4x E-Houses incl auxiliary power buildings for multiple trains at gas growth project. Control systems and FAR package for compressor station. Multiple E-House commissioning projects and services. Safety and process control systems for BGC facilities. ICSS systems for upstream gas production facilities in Pakistan Wellhead control systems for multiple sites in Romania and Pakistan ICSS, SCADA, networking, and telecom systems for a water reclamation facility. ICSS upgrades and PI system services at multiple sites for Chevron Pacific Indonesia. Wellhead control systems and facilities

ervices. Safety and process control systems for BGC facilities. ICSS systems for upstream gas production facilities in Pakistan Wellhead control systems for multiple sites in Romania and Pakistan ICSS, SCADA, networking, and telecom systems for a water reclamation facility. ICSS upgrades and PI system services at multiple sites for Chevron Pacific Indonesia. Wellhead control systems and facilities upgrades for multiple facilities for TengizChevrOil. Chuandongbei sour gas plant commissioning services for Chevron China. ICSS for Shell’s Alaskan Barge project. Wellhead control systems for oshore platform in the North-Western Pacific Region. INTECH starts building wellhead control panels Str ategic Global Locations 500+ projects in Americas 500+ projects in Africa 1000+ projects in GCC & CIS Dubai, U AEHouston, T x Al-Khobar, K SALagos, NG Manufacturing FacilitiesProject Footprint INTECH is a global operations technology solution provider with a rich history of delivering projects in key energy-producing regions around the world. We excel in delivering best-fit solutions with localized services for end-to-end project lifecycle coverage. We leverage multi-disciplinary expertise fostered by assiduous in-house R&D, and strategic partnerships with technology champions to guarantee successful project execution. About Us At INTECH, we are keenly aware of the urgent challenges facing the industry in decarbonization, sustainable energy, and minimizing conversion losses. Partner with us to confidently move towards achieving climate neutrality while remaining competitive in a rapidly evolving market. Green Energy Initiatives CSIA | API | ISO 9001, 27001, 14001, 45001 INTECH AT A GLANCE Manufacturing Facilities JAFZA, U AE: Facility, and fabrication yardsHouston, T x: Facility, and fabrication yards Al-Khobar, K SA: Manufacturing facilityLagos, NG: Testing & integration facility Company Overview Expertise Profile 30+ Continuous Years 40+ Countries Served 13 Global Locations 550+

volving market. From periodically recurring trainings to a well-defined succession plan, INTECH invests heavily in the training, development, and retention of its employees, keeping them abreast of technological developments and industry practices. Engineers at INTECH go through numerous OEM-specific trainings and refresher courses each year. Each engineer goes through over 20 internal and external trainings focused on

eriodically recurring trainings to a well-defined succession plan, INTECH invests heavily in the training, development, and retention of its employees, keeping them abreast of technological developments and industry practices. Engineers at INTECH go through numerous OEM-specific trainings and refresher courses each year. Each engineer goes through over 20 internal and external trainings focused on OEM/vendor systems, industry standards, third party certifications, and HSE trainings. Geographical Business Units Project Managers average 15+ years of industry experience Training and hands-on experience on at least four major OEMs’ equipment At least 100 formal training hours per year CAP and TUV certified engineer PMP trained and certified Project Managers Design and Engineering lead of at least four major projects Engineers & Designers average 8+ years of industry experience        IIoT Division30% Project Controls9% Proposal Engineers5% Project Managers5% Automation Engineers28% Control System, I&E Designers, OEM 23% 30% 9% 5% 5% 28% 23% Digital SolutionsAutomation INTECH provides vendor-neutral automation solutions tailored for diverse applications in the energy industry. We cover the entire MAC scope starting from a project’s concept and FEED to its integration and commissioning for both greenfield and brownfield facilities. INTECH provides software-based proprietary and third-party solutions to help businesses transition into Industry 4.0. Our expertise lies in leveraging data to achieve operational excellence, allowing organizations to extract maximum value from existing data, assets, and personnel while reducing operating costs and enhancing security. Telecom & Auxiliary Systems Industrial Operations Management Industrial Data & Analytics We build rugged systems that are reliable, have high-availability, and can thrive in extreme and hazardous environments complete with certifications for compatibility. These solutions are enhanced through a large network

xisting data, assets, and personnel while reducing operating costs and enhancing security. Telecom & Auxiliary Systems Industrial Operations Management Industrial Data & Analytics We build rugged systems that are reliable, have high-availability, and can thrive in extreme and hazardous environments complete with certifications for compatibility. These solutions are enhanced through a large network of partner-based products and in-house software solutions. Integrated Control Systems SCADA & Virtualization Turbomachinery Controls Our solutions are based on industry standards, including NIST Cybersecurity Framework, ISO/IEC 27001, IEC 62443, and others. With a deep understanding of the challenges involved in delivering reliable and sustainable electrical power, we build innovative solutions tailored to project timelines and facility space constraints. OT Cybersecurity Implementation OT CybersecurityElectrical Solutions INTECH specializes in OT Cybersecurity to secure and protect OT systems in industrial facilities and critical infrastructure. With over 30 years of expertise in the OT domain, INTECH excels at helping organizations achieve comprehensive cyber resilience and secure both their new and legacy OT systems from internal and external threats. INTECH oers comprehensive electrical solutions for the energy and utilities industries. We specialize in automated substations, prefabricated e-houses, and comprehensive services for electrical systems’ management. OT Cybersecurity Consultancy Energy Management Solutions Smart Buildings and E-Houses Brownfield Electrical System Electrical Field Services FIeld ServicesSkids & Packages INTECH provides modular, sustainable, and reusable wellsite assets to enhance operational eiciency and minimize downtime. We deliver these as fully integrated and customizable skids for multiple assets. Our skids and packages are built at in-house and partner fabrication facilities, and are certifiable for hazardous areas, ingress

al System Electrical Field Services FIeld ServicesSkids & Packages INTECH provides modular, sustainable, and reusable wellsite assets to enhance operational eiciency and minimize downtime. We deliver these as fully integrated and customizable skids for multiple assets. Our skids and packages are built at in-house and partner fabrication facilities, and are certifiable for hazardous areas, ingress protection, and explosion proofing to multiple industrial standards. INTECH field services are tailored to meet the needs of each facility. Our engineers possess OEM-trainings from all major vendors, get continuous skill enhancement trainings, and have extensive project experience in multiple domains. Facility Surveys & Troubleshooting Commissioning & Integration O&M Contracts Operator & Personnel Training Services Wellhead Control Panels Analyzer Skids Modular Wellsite Skids Chemical Injection Skids Our flexible models cover resident, rotational, on-call, and remote services to ensure that skilled professional support is available whenever needed. Metering Skids High-Integrity Pressure Protection Systems Industrial Intelligence Through many years of internal research and development, we have invented a set of proprietary software frameworks designed exclusively for the industrial operations environment. These frameworks cover everything from digital twins and data models to machine learning models and front-end software components. INTECH's IIS, built on the plantOS Platform, allows enterprises to speed up their digital evolutions by: Asset Management System Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS) EmpowerGPT Software and applications for Industry 4.0 and beyond - helping you accelerate your digital journey Unifying IT, OT, and IIOT into a single framework Providing a rich modeling environment for asset, production, logistics, and business operations Bringing real-time business intelligence to the plant floor through a streaming analytics framework Delivering a

nance Management System (CMMS) EmpowerGPT Software and applications for Industry 4.0 and beyond - helping you accelerate your digital journey Unifying IT, OT, and IIOT into a single framework Providing a rich modeling environment for asset, production, logistics, and business operations Bringing real-time business intelligence to the plant floor through a streaming analytics framework Delivering a flexible application building environment that allows a customer to grow their use cases with increasing speed of deployment Automation Lab Locations Vendor Expertise Execution Methodology INTECH is also setting up its automation labs in Iraq and Angola Our project execution methodology ensures that customer needs are met cost eectively while remaining within the project deadlines. The core of our expertise lies with INTECH’s technically competent regional teams, which are responsible for customer engagement and project management right from scope definition to the final handover. The back-end engineering oices work in tandem with regional teams to ensure that solutions are delivered as per global best practices and compliant to statutory & regulatory requirements. Our front-end engineering teams work closely with customers and vendors to stay abreast of industry trends and advancements. Our strategically located manufacturing facilities ensure speedy project delivery across the world. INTECH’s competitive advantage also stems from its automation labs, used to adopt newer technologies, internal project testing, and personnel training. Over the years INTECH has enhanced and developed its automation lab to cover: USAPakistanKSANigeriaUAE Installation and commissioning S AT Long-term maintenance and after-sales support    Project Delivery Panel manufacturing Internal QA and FAT Packaging and shipment    Manufacturing Facilities Customer engagement & scope definition Engineering, design, project management Regional supply chain management    Project Initiation

developed its automation lab to cover: USAPakistanKSANigeriaUAE Installation and commissioning S AT Long-term maintenance and after-sales support    Project Delivery Panel manufacturing Internal QA and FAT Packaging and shipment    Manufacturing Facilities Customer engagement & scope definition Engineering, design, project management Regional supply chain management    Project Initiation Procurement Technical support and sharing global best practices   Engineering Oice USA KSANigeria UAE R&D of state of the art technological process solutions Access to systems from major vendors like: SMAR, Honeywell, Rockwell, Yokogawa, Invensys, HIMA etc. to help our subject matter experts design and test best-fit solutions Training customers on the various systems and resources available Building employee competency through workshops on learning and adapting to newer systems     Health, Safety & EnvironmentQuality Standards & Compliances Safety Systems API RP14B API RP14C API RP14H IEC 61508 IEC 61511 SP 84P Hazardous Areas API RP14J API RP500 API RP505 IEC 60079 NEC 500/505 Fire Systems NFPA72 NFPA85 NFPA86 API RP14G IEC 60331 IEC 60332 Classification Societies ABS DNV Alarm Management EEMUA191 Others IEC 61131 IEC 61000 API RP14F EEMUA201 EEMUA189 NEC409 NEC490 Cybersecurity SO-27001 ISA/IEC-62443 NIST CSF NRTL/ Marks UL FM CSA TUV CE ATEX BASEEFA LR Enclosure Type NEMA250 IEC60529 Other Bodies MMS USCG INTECH’s success has been built on our ability to continuously improve our products and services. We ensure that our quality of service and execution for every project remains compliant to both international standards and customer-specific requirements. To ensure these standards are maintained in all our oices, the company has a comprehensive set of procedures and frameworks that monitor customer satisfaction during the project execution lifecycle. Country Managers lead all quality related matters with assistance from regional QHSE Leads. Evaluations for

roject remains compliant to both international standards and customer-specific requirements. To ensure these standards are maintained in all our oices, the company has a comprehensive set of procedures and frameworks that monitor customer satisfaction during the project execution lifecycle. Country Managers lead all quality related matters with assistance from regional QHSE Leads. Evaluations for project teams are tied with their feedback scores, ensuring commitment towards customer satisfaction. The root cause for any issue is marked by incorporating feedback from all the stakeholders and identifying all sources that may have caused non-compliance. Corrective actions are identified, marked and implemented with consent of all parties involved. A log of issues encountered and lessons learnt is maintained for future reference. INTECH is certified by multiple international standardization bodies, and follows many more industrial standards to ensure quality. Health, Safety and Environment at the INTECH have primary importance in every activity we perform. We are committed to deliver our projects and operational activities with no harm to employees, community, subcontractors, visitors and the environment as a whole. INTECH’s due diligence in maintaining and implementing the best practices and HSE procedures worldwide has ensured that our objectives of achieving international and national standards are met and exceeded. roject remains compliant to both international standards and customer-specific requirements. To ensure these standards are maintained in all our oices, the company has a comprehensive set of procedures and frameworks that monitor customer satisfaction during the project execution lifecycle. Country Managers lead all quality related matters with assistance from regional QHSE Leads. Evaluations for project teams are tied with their feedback scores, ensuring commitment towards customer satisfaction. The root cause for any issue is marked by incorporating feedback from all the stakeholders and identifying all sources that may have caused non-compliance. Corrective actions are identified, marked and implemented with consent of all parties involved. A log of issues encountered and lessons learnt is maintained for future reference. INTECH is certified by multiple international standardization bodies, and follows many more industrial standards to ensure quality. Health, Safety and Environment at the INTECH have primary importance in every activity we perform. We are committed to deliver our projects and operational activities with no harm to employees, community, subcontractors, visitors and the environment as a whole. INTECH’s due diligence in maintaining and implementing the best practices and HSE procedures worldwide has ensured that our objectives of achieving international and national standards are met and exceeded.
